summary: A vertical online-safety public-service announcement, posted by the DHS Know2Protect campaign, about online sextortion. It alternates dark blue title cards bearing white and orange text ('WANT TO KNOW WHY?', 'PROTECT YOURSELF') with a dramatized scene of a teenager hunched over against a wall, overlaid with a swarm of menacing chat-message bubbles ('Girl, you a baddie. U look so good', 'Promise I wont leak. Just 1 more', 'You ghosting me??', 'WYD?'). The spoken narration recounts a case in which a man used fake teen profiles to manipulate minors. The audio is narration over a music bed.

script.scene: Dark blue title card with white and orange text: 'WANT TO KNOW WHY?'.

Dramatized scene: a teenager hunches over with their head down against a wall, surrounded by a swarm of overlaid chat-message bubbles such as 'Promise I wont leak. Just 1 more' and 'You ghosting me??'.
Dark blue end card with text: 'PROTECT YOURSELF'.

notable_text: WANT TO KNOW WHY?; PROTECT YOURSELF; Promise I wont leak. Just 1 more; You ghosting me??; Girl, you a baddie. U look so good; WYD?
